strengths: Current production work on agentic AI and MCP frameworks at re:cinq demonstrates hands-on technical depth in core domain
Strong distributed-systems and backend expertise from Dunnhumby (millions of HTTP/sec microservices) and multiple senior engineer roles
Proven adaptability across multiple languages and technology stacks, suggesting architectural flexibility needed for model-agnostic design
concerns: Limited evidence of scaling engineering organizations to 10-30+ people; resume shows strong individual contributor and staff roles but unclear organizational leadership scope
Agentic AI work at re:cinq is recent (April 2025); no demonstrated track record of production multi-agent systems at the maturity and scale required for CTO-level decisions
Minimal fintech infrastructure experience; one brief investment role (RIDE Capital) but background primarily in logistics, GIS, and marketing—missing stated fintech familiarity advantage
response.justification: Bogdan is a technically accomplished engineer with deep backend systems expertise and emerging agentic AI experience. However, the CTO role explicitly requires five years of senior technical leadership and demonstrated team scaling to 30+ engineers; the resume shows strong individual-contributor and staff roles with unclear organizational leadership scope. Production multi-agent system experience is restricted to a recent (<2 year) role with unproven maturity at the scale required for major infrastructure decisions. Fintech domain expertise—flagged as a meaningful advantage—is essentially absent. A strong technical hire for a senior engineering role, but significant gaps for executive-level CTO responsibilities.
